<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band12-1_chunk003.pdf#page=21 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band12 p140 -->

FLINTSBACH AM INN

<!-- header: FLINTSBACH AM INN -->


[[File:Band12-1_chunk003_p021_img001.jpg|thumb|Der Kirchenraum nach Oster]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk003_p021_img002.jpg|thumb]]



----
14]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band12 p141 -->
